Name: FMovieSceneEvaluationField
Description: Memory layout optimized primarily for speed of searching the applicable ranges

Variables.Name: Ranges
Variables.Description: Ranges stored separately for fast (cache efficient) lookup. Each index has a corresponding entry in FMovieSceneEvaluationField::Groups.

Variables.Name: Groups
Variables.Description: Groups that store segment pointers for each of the above ranges. Each index has a corresponding entry in FMovieSceneEvaluationField::Ranges.

Variables.Name: MetaData
Variables.Description: Meta data that maps to entries in the 'Ranges' array.
